definitions.definition: External genital organs of the female mammal.
The external female genital organs, including the clitoris, vaginal lips, and the opening to the vagina.
The external, visible part of the female genitalia surrounding the urethral and vaginal opening(s).
The external, visible part of the female genitalia surrounding the urethral and vaginal opening. The vulva includes the clitoris and inner as well as outer labia.
